meaning: 拉扎勒斯(男子名) ;n.[圣经] 拉撒路,麻疯病患者
examples: 10so the chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus as well.
Mrs Lazarus stayed on board and helped to win back clients.
20at his gate was laid a beggar named Lazarus, covered with sores.
Ariel, which was published in 1965, includes Lady Lazarus, Daddy and Fever 103 Degrees.
As their brother Lazarus, tenor Russell Thomas sang with a remarkably good crisp voice.
